titleStmt.title: SII 40.256: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 256. (A.R. No. B. 301 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up before the Sakalēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1111, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.
Records the renewal of earlier gift of lands made to Brāhmaṇas by Nārapa-Nāyaka and Kommi-Nāyaka, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara kōṭakētarājulaku dharmamugā śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1111 nēṁṭi Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtti nimittammu
dhārāpūrvvakaṁbaina vṛttulu gāsyapagōtrammārebhaṭla
kha 4 na 10 vīri padmanābhuni kha 2 vīri bollepeddi kha 2
kauṁḍinyagōtra dāmōdarabhaṭṭa kha 2 vīrivāmana bhaṭṭa kha 2
bhāradvāja gōtralayi tana bhaṭṭa kha 4 haritagōtra doḍḍe
bhaṭla kha 4 gautamagōtra cevvanabhaṭla kha 2 Ātrēyagōtra A
nnebhaṭṭakha 2 vaṁgipuramu lōhitagōtra kommanabhaṭla kha 4 vīri
śrīdharabhaṭla kha 2 śrīvatsagōtra mārebhaṭla kha 3 kauśika gōtra
nāranabhaṭla kha 2 bōjaṁgā mānabhaṭla kha 2 Ātrēyagōtra kāmunabhaṭla kha
2 bhāragōtra dārēsva
gōtradēti ḍi kha 6 vīrimallimaṁci kha 2
kūci kha gautamagōtra dēvanama

śrīvaca gō
tramuna kā
ṭaju kha 1
haritagōtrā
mu baṁḍḍarāju
kauṁḍinya gōtra
brammadēvapeṭṭi
kha 3 kaumaṁḍinya
gōtra bhairavaku
ba kha 1
Digital edition of SII 40.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
